title: EntityPathSeer
description: Toggle Hitboxes to see an entity's intended path!
body:
### Discover where mobs are headed!

EntityPathSeer is a small, server-friendly Minecraft mod that allows you to visualize and track the movement targets of mobs in real time. Whether you’re debugging AI behavior, building complex mob contraptions, or just curious where that wandering creeper is planning to go next, this mod gives you a clear visual of its path.

### Features:

Target Visualization: See the exact point a mob is moving toward with easy-to-read vectors in-world.

Server-Client Sync: Mob target positions are synchronized efficiently to clients for precision.

Lightweight: Minimal performance impact, purely observational, with _no_ gameplay changes.

Perfect for mapmakers, mod developers, or anyone curious about the AI paths of mobs in Minecraft.
